title: Icarus confused about signed/unsigned in strange ?: example

features.name: ternary with signed var and unsigned literal
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where one branch is a signed variable and the other is an unsigned literal, causing incorrect signedness propagation

features.name: comparison of ternary results with different signedness
features.description: Code should include a less-than comparison between two ternary expressions where one result has mixed signedness and the other preserves signed type

features.name: signed wire with negative initialization
features.description: Code should include a wire declared as signed and initialized with a negative value
